title: indigofera eriocarpa
intro: Indigofera eriocarpa, also known as the Australian indigo, is a plant species belonging to the pea family that is native to Australia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Indigofera eriocarpa include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used topically in the form of a salve or cream to promote wound healing and skin health.
